case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER VS. SAN FRANCISCO CAR WASH COMPANY, LLC

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CAR WASH COMPANY, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA WINNING FINISH CAR WASH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
